title: Breakwave Tanker Report 8.26.2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 26/08/2025
VLCC Market Closes August on a Stronger Footing - In the final week of August, MEG activity strengthened sharply as cargo flows accelerated
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2025-08-26_Breakwave_Tankers_August_26_2025_Report.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/shipbuilding/pdfs/2025-08-26_Breakwave_Tankers_August_26_2025_Report.pdf

[Page 1]
Tanker Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
August 26, 2025
• VLCC Market Closes August on a Stronger Footing - In the final week of August,
Short-term Indicators
MEG activity strengthened sharply as cargo flows accelerated, with rates in some
Momentum: Positive
cases climbing nearly 10 points in a single day. This surge capped an already
robust August, signaling a clear rebound from the late-July dip. Looking ahead, Sentiment: Positive
approximately 40 first-decade September cargoes are already in play, with another Fundamentals: Positive
10 likely to emerge.
